channel.title: Indiana Legislature Bill Tracker on Indiana Legislative Tools
channel.description: Recent content in Indiana Legislature Bill Tracker on Indiana Legislative Tools

item.title: Education
item.description:
Education is a cornerstone issue in Indiana's legislative agenda. The state has been working to improve its education system through various initiatives, including increasing funding for K-12 schools, implementing new programs to help students succeed, and addressing teacher compensation.
Recent focus areas include literacy, workforce development programs, school choice options, and enhanced teacher recruitment and retention strategies.

item.title: State Budget
item.description:
Bill Summary

House Bill 1001 is the state budget bill that makes significant changes to education funding in Indiana.

Key Provisions

  • Removes income maximums for choice scholarship eligibility
  • Changes curricular materials funding
  • Provides state funding for adult charter schools
  • Requires reporting on dual credit alignment
  • Prohibits excessive fees for career scholarship students
  • Mandates more frequent distribution of choice scholarships
  • Requires the Commission for Higher Education to report on facility utilization

Current Status

The bill has passed the House and is now being considered in the Senate.
